summary: Complete testing of 'Sinistro Smart' algorithm and Perizia Sinistro 5-step wizard. Backend: 16/16 tests PASS including cost calculation formulas, recalc endpoint, PDF generation, and archivio stats. Frontend: All 5 wizard steps verified with correct UI elements and interactions.

backend_sinistro_smart_algorithm.GET /api/perizie/codici-danno: PASS - Returns 7 damage codes (S1-DEF, S2-WELD, A1-ANCH, A2-CONC, P1-ZINC, G1-GAP, M1-FORCE)
backend_sinistro_smart_algorithm.POST /api/perizie/: PASS - Creates perizia with auto-calculated voci_costo using Sinistro Smart algorithm
backend_sinistro_smart_algorithm.AUT.01/02: PASS - Generated for M1-FORCE damage code
backend_sinistro_smart_algorithm.POST /api/perizie/{id}/recalc: PASS - Recalculates costs after module/code changes
backend_sinistro_smart_algorithm.GET /api/perizie/{id}: PASS - Returns perizia with all fields

frontend_wizard_step2_foto.Foto Panoramica button: PASS - Blue button with ImagePlus icon
frontend_wizard_step2_foto.Dettaglio Danno button: PASS - Red button with Focus icon

frontend_wizard_step3_diagnosi.5 severity groups: PASS - STRUTTURALE, ANCORAGGIO, ESTETICO/PROTETTIVO, SICUREZZA, AUTOMAZIONE
frontend_wizard_step3_diagnosi.7 damage tags: PASS - S1-DEF, S2-WELD, A1-ANCH, A2-CONC, P1-ZINC, G1-GAP, M1-FORCE
frontend_wizard_step3_diagnosi.Tag selection ring effect: PASS - Selected tags show ring-4 effect and check icon

frontend_wizard_step5_riepilogo.Computo metrico table: PASS - 6 cost items with codice, descrizione, quantita×prezzo, totale

frontend_perizia_list_page.Table columns: PASS - Numero, Data, Cliente, Tipo Danno, Totale, Stato
frontend_perizia_list_page.Row actions: PASS - View, PDF download, Delete buttons

frontend_archivio_sinistri_page.KPI cards: PASS - Perizie Totali, Volume Totale, Importo Medio, Codici Danno Usati
frontend_archivio_sinistri_page.Andamento Mensile chart: PASS - Bar chart showing monthly trend
frontend_archivio_sinistri_page.Stato Perizie chart: PASS - Pie chart showing status distribution
frontend_archivio_sinistri_page.Per Tipo di Danno: PASS - Progress bar by damage type

critical_code_review_comments: calc_voci_costo function correctly implements Sinistro Smart algorithm with category-based formulas
Frontend wizard step validation properly enforces required fields before navigation
All data-testid attributes correctly applied for testing
Cost table displays quantita × prezzo_unitario formula correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test perizia PER-2026/0001 with S1-DEF and P1-ZINC codes, total 2124.00 EUR
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sinistro Smart algorithm fully tested and verified. Key implementation details: 1) calc_voci_costo generates cost items based on codici_danno: MAT.01 (material with markup), TRA.01 (transport €60/€120), MAN.01 (smontaggio €40/ml), MAN.02 (montaggio €50/ml), AUT.01/02 (for M1-FORCE), SIC.01 (for G1-GAP €180), NOR.01 (certifications €150), SMA.01 (disposal €90). 2) Frontend wizard has 5 steps: Cantiere (GPS/map), Foto (panoramica/dettaglio), Diagnosi (7 tags in 5 groups), Misure (sliders/pricing), Riepilogo (cost table/actions). 3) All endpoints tested: codici-danno, CRUD, recalc, PDF, archivio/stats. 4) ArchivioSinistriPage shows KPIs and charts.
